headline: Gen and xAI Partner to Build Trusted AI Assistants for Millions of Consumers
summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), the company behind Norton, Avast, LifeLock and MoneyLion, and xAI today announced a partnership to bring xAI's frontier Grok models into Gen's consumer platforms. xAI and Gen will collaborate to rapidly advance their technologies for the next wave of AI-powered consumer products.

headline: Wondering what's happening in today's S&P500  pre-market session?
summary: As the US market prepares to open on Tuesday, let's get an early glimpse into the pre-market session and identify the S&P500 stocks leading the pack in terms of gains and losses.
